Mapping between scene handles and their associated viewport handles.
Factory for creating LegacyRenderPass objects from scene snapshots.
Per-frame context passed to systems during game loop updates.
Component for managing local and world transformations of a GameObject.
Central game state container for entities, resources, and the active level.
Session state container for game-wide state.
Low-level rendering device abstraction (OpenGL/Vulkan/etc.).

Component for associating a renderable object with an entity.
Module exports for vector and matrix type definitions.
High-level facade for entity manipulation in the ECS.
Scene graph node representing a transform and optional renderable.
Lightweight GUID (globally unique identifier) implementation.
Versioned handle for referencing entities in an EntityPool.
Represents a 3D transformation consisting of translation, rotation and scale.
Central manager for scoped loggers with configurable sinks.
Simple synchronous logger with configurable output sinks.
Mapping of uniform names to values used by shader programs.
Definitions of uniform semantics used by shaders.
Container for enqueued render commands and renderables.

Immutable snapshot of input state at a specific point in time.
Aggregate module re-exporting all engine role concepts.
Registry for mapping command types to their handlers.
